documents.title: Nominee Public Financial Disclosure (OGE Form 278e)
documents.summary: Filed January 2, 2025 ahead of confirmation as Transportation Secretary. Lists three outside positions: BGR Government Affairs LLC (advisory board, ended November 2024), Duffy Enterprises LLC (consulting), and Fox Corporation (co-host, ended November 2024). Morgan Stanley IRA holds 30-plus individual equities including Alphabet, Amazon, American Tower, Apple, Argenx, ASML, Blackstone, Broadcom, Danaher, Deere, Doordash, DraftKings, Eaton, Eli Lilly, Hilton, Howmet Aerospace, Intercontinental Exchange, Las Vegas Sands, Linde, Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Marvell Technology, Mastercard, Meta, Microsoft, Monster Beverage, NVIDIA, Oracle, Progressive, Shopify, Taiwan Semiconductor and UnitedHealth — most in the $1,001-$15,000 range, with Amazon, Apple, Microsoft and NVIDIA in $15,001-$50,000.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement
documents.summary: Signed January 13, 2025. Resigned from BGR Government Affairs (one-year cooling-off recusal); will keep Duffy Enterprises LLC dormant during appointment. Notes spouse remains employed by Fox News Network and triggers covered-relationship recusal regarding Fox Corporation/Fox News. Pledges to divest within 90 days of confirmation: Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Ares Capital Corporation, Blackstone Private Credit Fund (BCRED), Blue Owl Capital Corporation, K-INFRA Class S Hedge Fund, KKR Private Equity Conglomerate (K-PEC), Microsoft, NVIDIA. Also commits to demonetize his Meta Platforms accounts.

documents.title: Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance
documents.summary: Filed before the May 5, 2025 deadline. Marks Yes on resignations, divestitures, 278-T filing (referencing the April 23, 2025 transaction report), managed accounts, interim recusals, and both recusal commitments. Marks Yes on a 5 C.F.R. 2635.502(d) authorization dated January 31, 2025 covering Fox Corporation and Fox News Network; no 18 U.S.C. 208 waiver claimed.

documents.title: Periodic Transaction Report (278-T) — April 23, 2025
documents.summary: Signed April 23, 2025 covering February through March 2025 activity. Discloses 38 transactions: a single Microsoft purchase on February 7, then a sweeping divestiture wave on February 11 (Vertex, UnitedHealth, Oracle, Amazon, NVIDIA, Taiwan Semiconductor, Las Vegas Sands, Eaton, argenx, American Tower, ASML, Mastercard, Meta, Intercontinental Exchange, Monster Beverage, Alphabet, Hilton, Blackstone, Marvell, Broadcom, Shopify, DraftKings, Datadog, DoorDash, Vaxcyte, Howmet, Apple, Danaher, Deere, Eli Lilly, Microsoft, Progressive, Ares Capital), plus Blue Owl on February 13, KKR K-PEC and K-INFRA on February 14, and Blackstone Private Credit Fund (BCRED) on March 31. KKR K-PEC sale in $100K-$250K range; K-INFRA and BCRED in $50K-$100K; Microsoft and Ares Capital in $15K-$50K. All flagged No for late notification.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: ProPublica's Trump Team Financial Disclosures index was reachable but its individual-appointee detail pages could not be parsed via WebFetch. Cross-check deferred.
